title: Phase 4 first supervised local Task Cell
objective: Document the safe supervised local execution model that will be used for real phase 4 task work.
context: This cell represents the first real local use of the harness in phase 4. It is intentionally documentation-focused and low risk.
constraints: Stay local to the harness repository.
Do not call external CLIs without explicit approval.
Do not distribute work across machines.
acceptance_criteria: The local execution mode is explicit.
The task remains small and reversible.
The report captures implementation and review results.
The status is traceable without agent autonomy.
implementer_prompt: Implement the phase 4 first supervised local task as a documentation and fixture update. Keep the change small and reviewable.
reviewer_prompt: Review the phase 4 first supervised local task for safety guardrails, completeness, and phase boundary compliance.
